{{- define "tier" -}} {{- $label := index . "label" -}} {{- $size := index . "size" -}} {{- $sponsors := index . "sponsors" -}} {{- if $sponsors }}
{{ $label }}
{{- range $sponsors}} {{ .Name }} {{- end }}
{{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- template "tier" (dict "label" "Diamond" "size" 128 "sponsors" (index .ByTier "diamond")) -}} {{- template "tier" (dict "label" "Platinum" "size" 112 "sponsors" (index .ByTier "platinum")) -}} {{- template "tier" (dict "label" "Gold" "size" 96 "sponsors" (index .ByTier "gold")) -}} {{- template "tier" (dict "label" "Silver" "size" 80 "sponsors" (index .ByTier "silver")) -}}
